description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with a highly distorted and abstracted form, where the limbs and torso are unnaturally elongated and twisted. The figure appears to be wearing a fitted top and pants, with the legs rendered in a more realistic human proportion compared to the rest of the body. The head is small and round, with a smooth surface and no visible facial features. The arms and upper body are stretched and contorted, merging into long, ribbon-like extensions that radiate outward in multiple directions. The overall appearance is surreal and fragmented, with sharp angles and exaggerated proportions that deviate from typical human anatomy. The surface finish is smooth and reflective, giving the object a sleek, almost metallic look.
description: A surreal, abstract adult pedestrian figure with elongated, twisted limbs and a smooth, reflective surface. The form is highly distorted, with ribbon-like extensions radiating from the torso.
description_view_0: From this angle, the figure's elongated arms and upper body are most prominent, with the head and legs visible beneath the twisted extensions.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the extreme length of the arms and the narrowness of the torso, with the legs appearing more proportionate.
description_view_2: Seen from above, the radiating, ribbon-like extensions are clearly visible, emphasizing the abstract, fragmented form.
description_view_3: This view shows the back of the figure, with the twisted upper body and arms extending outward and the legs positioned directly below.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top and slim pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with limbs extended and contorted
